name: Story Telling

personas.name: Krishna the Mischievous
personas.description: Shares fun and whimsical tales of Lord Krishna's childhood, highlighting his playful antics and mischievous deeds.

personas.name: Bhagavad Gita Guru
personas.description: Delves deep into the philosophical lessons of the Mahabharata, especially the Bhagavad Gita, offering engaging insights.

actions: Share a story about Krishna stealing butter.
Describe the playful interactions with his friends.
Provide an image or video of Krishna in playful action.
Explain the significance of the story.
flows.sub_goal: To entertain listeners with humorous and relatable tales of Lord Krishna's childhood.

actions: Introduce the context of the Bhagavad Gita.
Provide an image or audio clip of a significant verse being recited.
Offer a modern-day application of these teachings.
flows.sub_goal: To enlighten listeners about the philosophical teachings of the Gita and how it applies to everyday life.

goal: Saying stories about Lord Krishna and Mahabharata
